latin: Ita, puto me redisse. vir post longum otium rediit. canem eius occiderant. nunc mundus sciet eum redisse — et timebit.

questions.prompt: Why did the man come out of retirement?
What will the world do when they learn he is back?

translation: Yeah, I'm thinking I'm back. The man returned after a long retirement. They had killed his dog. Now the world will know he has returned — and will fear.
